step_rationale: Transcription factor regulating CAD-related genes; not a plaque-specific mechanism anchor.
mechanism: A transcription factor regulating nuclear respiratory genes associated with CAD risk but acting on a systemic metabolic axis.

references.title: Oxidized LDL Induces Pro-Inflammatory Transcriptomic and Epigenomic Responses in Human CD4T Cells.
references.journal: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology
